features.feat1_desc: Predictive forecasting that actually works. We scan your historical trends to see the future before it hits your balance sheet.
features.feat2_desc: Automatically find and eliminate duplicate records, phantom inventory, and "dead" data that haunts your productivity.
features.feat3_desc: An intelligent cross-sell recommender that identifies perfect product pairings based on real-time buyer behavior.

cta.title: Ready to turn messy data into clear decisions?

pricing.hero_subtitle: A modern spa day for your data infrastructure. Stop fighting with archaic tools and start enjoying predictive serenity.
pricing.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about finding your data sanctuary. No corporate fluff allowed.
pricing.faq_quote: "The interface feels like a deep breath for my brain."

resources.subtitle: Guides, insights, and witty takes on why your spreadsheets are lying to you. We do the heavy lifting so your brain doesn't have to.

resources.card2_title: How to spot a 'Ghosting' client before they're gone.

resources.news_disclaimer: By subscribing, you agree to our Privacy Policy. We promise to be gentle.

get_started.subtitle: No high-pressure sales calls, no jargon-heavy pitches. Just a human conversation about how we can make your data suck less.
get_started.field1_label: What should we call you? (Besides 'The Data Hero')
get_started.field2_label: Where can we reach you? (Your email, not your pager)
get_started.field3_label: What's the biggest 'spreadsheet spaghetti' nightmare you're facing?
get_started.success_body: We'll be in touch before you have to untangle another vlookup.
get_started.promise_desc: We promise not to send a 50-page PDF or a 3-hour demo you didn't ask for. We keep things light, useful, and extinct-reptile-free.
get_started.feat1_desc: We handle the heavy lifting while you focus on what matters most.
get_started.feat2_desc: Connect your siloed apps into one beautiful, breathing ecosystem.
get_started.feat3_desc: Technology that speaks your language, not binary riddles.

how_it_works.title: How ModularAI Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: We review your spreadsheets, ERP exports, databases, webshop data, or existing reporting workflows.
how_it_works.step2_desc: We build a focused dashboard around one high-value business problem, such as inventory, sales, or product performance.
how_it_works.step3_desc: We add forecasting, recommendations, anomaly detection, or AI-assisted reporting where it creates measurable value.
how_it_works.step4_desc: We connect insights into your daily workflow so reports, alerts, and recommendations become actionable.
how_it_works.trust_desc: ModularAI can work with private databases, controlled access, and custom integrations depending on your company's security and workflow requirements.

testimonial.quote: "ModularAI helped us turn scattered operational data into a clear dashboard our team can actually use."
testimonial.author: Nagy Csaba
